header.subtitle: WHO WE ARE
header.title: 138+ Clients. 12+ Industries. Six Years of Engineering Excellence.

intro.text: Built in the AI era, not retrofitted for it. Trai Inc is a full-service IT solutions company headquartered in Lucknow, India. Since 2020, our team of engineers, designers, and strategists has delivered custom software, mobile apps, AI automation, cloud platforms, and digital marketing solutions for 138+ clients across 12+ industries — from local MSMEs to enterprise operations.

team.subtitle: LEADERSHIP TEAM
team.title: The engineers and strategists behind our platform

model.subtitle: HOW WE WORK
model.title: AI-Native Delivery at Scale
model.description: We combine deep engineering expertise with AI-powered development tools to deliver faster, cleaner, and more cost-effective solutions than traditional agencies. Every project gets a dedicated team lead, transparent sprint updates, and direct access to the engineers building your product.

advantages.title: Dedicated Team
advantages.desc: Every project is assigned a dedicated team lead and engineering resources. You get direct access to the people building your product.

advantages.title: AI-Augmented Speed
advantages.desc: Our team uses AI development tools — Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding workflows — to deliver enterprise-quality work in half the time of traditional agencies.

advantages.title: Fixed-Price Transparency
advantages.desc: Every project is scoped upfront with a fixed price. No hourly billing, no surprise invoices, no scope creep negotiations.

advantages.title: Full IP Ownership
advantages.desc: You own 100% of the code, design assets, and infrastructure. Complete handover with documentation. Zero vendor lock-in.

areas.title: Custom Software & Web Apps
areas.desc: Full-stack web platforms, SaaS products, admin dashboards, and enterprise tools built with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Python.

areas.title: Mobile App Development
areas.desc: Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using Flutter and React Native.

areas.title: AI, Automation & Chatbots
areas.desc: Custom AI agents, WhatsApp Business API integration, workflow automation with n8n, and intelligent chatbots powered by LLMs.

areas.title: Cloud & DevOps
areas.desc: Cloud migrations, serverless architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure on AWS, Cloudflare, Firebase, and Vercel.

areas.title: UI/UX & Brand Design
areas.desc: User research, wireframing, prototyping in Figma, brand identity systems, motion graphics, and presentation design.

areas.title: Digital Marketing & SEO
areas.desc: Local SEO, Google and Meta Ads, social media strategy, content marketing, email automation, and lead generation funnels.

areas.title: Enterprise Platforms
areas.desc: Custom CRM, ERP, HRMS, and project management systems tailored to your business workflows with real-time analytics.

areas.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance
areas.desc: Security audits, penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, and compliance frameworks for SOC 2, GDPR, and data protection.

milestones.title: Founded Trai Inc
milestones.desc: Launched as a digital marketing and software development firm in Lucknow, serving local businesses and startups.

milestones.title: Scaled to 50+ Clients
milestones.desc: Expanded service offerings and team. Delivered websites, marketing campaigns, and software across hospitality, retail, and real estate.

milestones.title: Enterprise & International Expansion
milestones.desc: Took on enterprise clients and expanded to international markets including the UK. Crossed 100+ total projects delivered.

milestones.title: AI-Native Transformation
milestones.desc: Adopted AI-augmented development workflows across the team. Integrated Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding tools into daily operations.

milestones.title: 138+ Clients & Product Launch
milestones.desc: Crossed 138+ clients served. Began developing a proprietary SaaS product to scale the tools and systems that power client delivery.

incubation.subtitle: TALENT DEVELOPMENT
incubation.title: Intern Incubator Program
incubation.text: We run an active intern incubation program training the next generation of engineers and marketers. Interns work on real client projects from day one, learning production-grade development, AI-native workflows, and professional delivery under mentorship from our senior team.

items.q: How long does an MVP take to build?
items.a: Our senior engineers work in rapid sprints, and we typically deliver a complete, launch-ready MVP in 4 to 8 weeks depending on the complexity of the requirements.

items.q: What is the typical cost for a custom software project?
items.a: For standard scopes like web applications or internal CRMs, pricing generally ranges from ₹2-8L depending on scope. For fully bespoke enterprise solutions, we provide a quote-based estimate after a scoping call.

items.q: Are you the best software development company in Lucknow?
items.a: We believe our results speak for themselves. Based in Lucknow, we bring Silicon Valley-grade engineering to Indian MSMEs across the country without the bloat of traditional IT agencies. We focus purely on lean architecture and rapid execution.

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Exceptional?
cta.description: Tell us about your project. Our team will scope it and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours.
